title: 4 Light Up Mini Glitter Flash Sticks - Button Activated Glow Sticks, 3 Flashing Modes, Includes Carry Strap Glow in the Dark Magical Wand, Blue Green Red & Pink (4 Bubble Wands)
description: Product description In each package you will receive a pack of a pack of four mini glitter sticks. The glow in the dark sticks come with different coloured handles (Red, Pink, Blue and Green) and have 3 different flash settings that can be flicked between by pressing a button. Each glow stick can be used as a party decoration for adults or kids and the glowsticks measure approximately 19.2cm / 7.5" with an attached carry strap that matches the colour of the body. These party supplies are very versatile and can be used at a wide number of events, such as, festival glow sticks and Halloween parties. The light up foam sticks have batteries included and are designed to be long life so they outlast the party lights. Please Note: This product is not suitable for children under the age of 3 and may trigger epilepsy in sensitive individuals Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 3 years of age
